envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Catalog of common enterprise tools with safe-default vs risky permission separation. Entries are template metadata consumed by RoleTemplate.default_tool_profile_ids, ConnectorPreset.tool_profile_ids, WorkflowTemplate.required_tool_profile_ids, and the Dandelion connector-priority engine. **NEVER live permissions.**
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: When recommending tools to a Twin, surface ToolProfile.name + category + role-specific notes. NEVER grant write capabilities from this catalog. ALWAYS defer write actions to PermissionBundle + ConnectorPreset + Foundation governance authorization. Honor data_sensitivity and no_leak_rules at every retrieval.
audit_expectations: ADMIN_ACTION:CONNECTOR_INVOKED on every connector action that consumes this profile per ADR-0057 + ADR-0071
envelope_defaults.adaptation_rules: ToolProfile entries adapt only through governed signals at runtime per ADR-0048; never through private profiling. Per-item data_sensitivity governs per-tool sensitivity.
envelope_defaults.override_rules: Companies may override defaults via Control Tower governance review; overrides logged with provenance per RULE 4 + ADR-0071.

items.name: Okta
items.governance_notes: Identity is a sovereignty anchor; integrations must never weaken Foundation TAR enforcement.
role_specific_usage_notes: IT Admin uses for provisioning + audit; Compliance uses for access review.

items.name: Microsoft Entra ID
items.description: Microsoft identity and access management (formerly Azure AD).
items.governance_notes: Same posture as Okta; conditional access policies must remain authoritative.
role_specific_usage_notes: Most common identity provider in Microsoft-shop enterprises.

items.name: Google Workspace Identity
items.governance_notes: Domain-wide delegation must be explicitly authorized and audited.

items.name: Slack
items.governance_notes: Messages may contain PII / customer data; redaction required at retrieval.
safe_defaults: read user-scoped DMs only when explicitly delegated
role_specific_usage_notes: EA / executives use heavily; engineering uses for incident routing.
no_leak_rules: never expose raw DM content in default surfaces

items.name: Microsoft Teams
items.governance_notes: Equivalent posture to Slack; meeting recordings subject to ADR-0079 transcript policy.
no_leak_rules: never expose raw chat in default surface

items.name: Gmail
items.governance_notes: Inbox access is high-sensitivity; default to draft-only.
role_specific_usage_notes: EA needs delegated send authority by Founder doctrine; always explicit, never default.
no_leak_rules: never expose email body in default surfaces

items.name: Outlook
items.governance_notes: Same posture as Gmail; draft-only by default.
role_specific_usage_notes: Most common in MS-shop EA / exec workflows.
no_leak_rules: never expose email body in default surfaces

items.name: Google Calendar
items.governance_notes: EA needs delegate-by-default; private events stay private titles only.
role_specific_usage_notes: Foundation calendar for EA + executive workflows; delegation is the canonical pattern.
no_leak_rules: never expose private event titles in default surfaces

items.name: Outlook Calendar
role_specific_usage_notes: Dominant in MS-shop EA / exec workflows.

items.name: Zoom
items.governance_notes: Recordings subject to ADR-0079 transcript policy.
role_specific_usage_notes: EA schedules executive meetings; AE uses for customer calls.

items.name: Google Drive
items.governance_notes: Document access scoped to caller; never expand share scope without approval.
safe_defaults: read documents the caller already has access to
role_specific_usage_notes: EA + executives use heavily for board / executive documents.
no_leak_rules: never expose document content in default surfaces

items.name: Google Docs
no_leak_rules: never expose document content in default surfaces

items.name: Google Sheets
items.governance_notes: Financial sheets must be approval-gated for write.
no_leak_rules: never expose raw cell contents in default surfaces

items.name: Google Slides
no_leak_rules: never expose deck content in default surfaces

items.name: Microsoft 365
no_leak_rules: never expose document content in default surfaces

items.name: SharePoint
items.governance_notes: Site-level permissions are authoritative; never elevate scope.
no_leak_rules: never expose document content in default surfaces

items.name: Notion
no_leak_rules: never expose page content in default surfaces

items.name: Confluence
role_specific_usage_notes: Common in enterprise engineering / compliance stacks.
no_leak_rules: never expose page content in default surfaces

items.name: Box
items.description: Cloud document storage with enterprise compliance.

items.name: Dropbox
role_specific_usage_notes: Lower enterprise share than Drive / OneDrive.
no_leak_rules: never expose file content in default surfaces

items.name: Jira
items.governance_notes: Status changes audited; transitions may have policy gates.
no_leak_rules: never expose customer-confidential ticket content in default surfaces

items.name: Linear
items.governance_notes: Same posture as Jira; smaller enterprise footprint.
no_leak_rules: never expose ticket content in default surfaces

items.name: Asana
items.governance_notes: Cross-team visibility variable; respect project ACLs.
no_leak_rules: never expose task content in default surfaces

items.name: Monday
no_leak_rules: never expose item content in default surfaces

items.name: ClickUp
no_leak_rules: never expose task content in default surfaces

items.name: Trello
items.governance_notes: Cards may be public; respect visibility.
no_leak_rules: never expose card content in default surfaces

items.name: Wrike
no_leak_rules: never expose task content in default surfaces

items.name: Airtable
items.governance_notes: Bases may hold PII; respect classification.
no_leak_rules: never expose record content in default surfaces

items.name: Smartsheet
no_leak_rules: never expose row content in default surfaces

items.name: Salesforce
items.governance_notes: Customer data is sensitive; profile + sharing rules authoritative.
safe_defaults: read records caller can access via sharing rules
forbidden_defaults: export full Account list without approval
no_leak_rules: never expose customer PII in default surfaces

items.name: HubSpot
no_leak_rules: never expose customer PII in default surfaces

items.name: Pipedrive
no_leak_rules: never expose customer PII in default surfaces

items.name: Outreach
items.governance_notes: Outbound emails subject to brand + compliance review.

items.name: Gong
items.governance_notes: Call recordings subject to ADR-0079 transcript policy.
forbidden_defaults: expose raw transcript content in default surface

items.name: Clari
items.governance_notes: Forecast data is sensitive; never expose externally.

items.name: Workday
items.governance_notes: Compensation + PII strictly scoped; never default-expose.
role_specific_usage_notes: CHRO + Compliance Officer; never default-expose compensation.
no_leak_rules: never expose compensation in default surfaces

items.name: Greenhouse
items.governance_notes: Candidate PII strictly scoped; never expose protected-class data.
safe_defaults: read jobs caller has access to
no_leak_rules: never expose interview scores in default surfaces

items.name: Lever
safe_defaults: read jobs caller has access to

items.name: Lattice
items.governance_notes: Performance reviews + 1:1 notes are sensitive; never expose manager surveillance signals.
role_specific_usage_notes: No employee scoring; no manager surveillance.

items.name: Culture Amp
items.governance_notes: Anonymous responses must remain anonymous; respect aggregation thresholds.
safe_defaults: read aggregated survey results above threshold

items.name: NetSuite
items.governance_notes: Financial data is critical; SOX controls authoritative.
safe_defaults: read summary reports caller can access
no_leak_rules: never expose ledger entries in default surfaces

items.name: QuickBooks
no_leak_rules: never expose transactions in default surfaces

items.name: Xero
no_leak_rules: never expose transactions in default surfaces

items.name: Ramp
items.governance_notes: Spend approval enforced by Ramp policy; never bypass thresholds.
role_specific_usage_notes: EA uses for executive expense; delegated authority explicit.

items.name: Coupa
items.governance_notes: Vendor data sensitive; approval chains authoritative.

items.name: SAP Concur
items.governance_notes: Founder doctrine: EA day-one aha-moment tool; delegated authority explicit per role template.
forbidden_defaults: book travel outside policy without approval
role_specific_usage_notes: EA's canonical travel+expense system; supports Travel Booking + Expense Shell aha moment.

items.name: Zendesk
items.governance_notes: Tickets may contain customer PII; redaction required.
forbidden_defaults: expose customer PII in default surfaces

items.name: Intercom
forbidden_defaults: expose customer PII in default surfaces

items.name: ServiceNow
items.governance_notes: Enterprise IT workflows; approval chains authoritative.

items.name: GitHub
items.governance_notes: Source code is critical; secrets must never leak.
no_leak_rules: never expose source code in default surfaces

items.name: GitLab
no_leak_rules: never expose source code in default surfaces

items.name: Bitbucket
no_leak_rules: never expose source code in default surfaces

items.name: Sentry
items.governance_notes: Stack traces may contain PII; redaction required.

items.name: Datadog
items.governance_notes: Logs may contain PII; respect ingestion redaction.

items.name: PagerDuty
items.governance_notes: Incident notes may contain customer data.

items.name: AWS
items.governance_notes: IAM is authoritative; never expand scope.
no_leak_rules: never expose resource ARNs in default surfaces

items.name: Azure
no_leak_rules: never expose subscription IDs in default surfaces

items.name: Figma
no_leak_rules: never modify sharing scope without approval

items.name: FigJam
no_leak_rules: never modify sharing scope without approval

items.name: Miro
no_leak_rules: never modify sharing scope without approval

items.name: Canva
no_leak_rules: never modify sharing scope without approval

items.name: Adobe Creative Cloud
no_leak_rules: never modify sharing scope without approval

items.name: DocuSign
items.governance_notes: Signed contracts are evidence; never alter.
role_specific_usage_notes: EA + Legal use heavily; signing scope explicit.
no_leak_rules: never auto-sign on behalf of executive

items.name: Ironclad
items.governance_notes: Contract data is privileged; redaction required.
no_leak_rules: never expose contract content in default surfaces

items.name: LinkSquares
no_leak_rules: never expose contract content in default surfaces

items.name: Evisort
no_leak_rules: never expose contract content in default surfaces

items.name: ContractPodAi
no_leak_rules: never expose contract content in default surfaces

items.name: Vanta
items.governance_notes: Compliance posture data is sensitive; never claim certification.
role_specific_usage_notes: Never claim 'guaranteed compliant'; ADR-0070 neutral compliance vocabulary.

items.name: OneTrust
items.governance_notes: Privacy posture data sensitive; respect jurisdiction boundaries.

items.name: CrowdStrike
items.governance_notes: Detection data sensitive; never auto-quarantine without policy.
no_leak_rules: never expose endpoint identifiers in default surfaces

items.name: 1Password
items.governance_notes: Secrets are critical; Foundation NEVER touches vault items directly.

items.name: Tableau
items.governance_notes: Dashboards may expose sensitive aggregations; respect row-level security.

items.name: Snowflake
items.governance_notes: Warehouse data is critical; row-level + column-level security authoritative.
